_comment: Guardrails for this repo. (1) permissions.deny hard-blocks Edit/Write to the READ-ONLY upstream repos llm-d/, llm-d-benchmark/, and llm-d-skills/. (2) PreToolUse hooks add an explanatory message when those edits are denied, and deny the agent from running pytest/ruff/make test|lint directly — those run automatically via the local git pre-commit hook on commits to main, not on demand.

hooks.command: c=$(jq -r '.tool_input.command // ""'); if printf '%s' "$c" | grep -qE -e '(^|[;&|]|&&|\|\|)[[:space:]]*([./[:alnum:]_-]*/)?(pytest|ruff)([[:space:]]|$)' -e 'python[0-9]*[[:space:]]+-m[[:space:]]+(pytest|ruff)([[:space:]]|$)' -e '(^|[;&|]|&&|\|\|)[[:space:]]*make[[:space:]]+(test|lint)([[:space:]]|$)'; then jq -n '{hookSpecificOutput:{hookEventName:"PreToolUse",permissionDecision:"deny",permissionDecisionReason:"pytest/ruff run automatically via the git pre-commit hook on commits to main \u2014 do not run them directly here; just git commit (bypass with --no-verify if needed)."}}'; fi
hooks.statusMessage: Checking command policy (pytest/ruff run via git hooks)

hooks.command: p=$(jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // ""'); if printf '%s' "$p" | grep -qE '(^|/)(llm-d|llm-d-benchmark|llm-d-skills)/'; then jq -n '{hookSpecificOutput:{hookEventName:"PreToolUse",permissionDecision:"deny",permissionDecisionReason:"llm-d/, llm-d-benchmark/ and llm-d-skills/ are READ-ONLY upstream repos \u2014 never edit. Read their docs/specs and shell out to their CLI; all new code lives under llm-d-benchmarking-agent-project/."}}'; fi
